data Nat { .zero, .succ(Nat) }
fn add(n: Nat, m: Nat): Nat / {} { match n { .zero => m, .succ(let n) => { let next = Nat.succ(m); add(n, next) } } }
---
add : (Nat, Nat) -> Nat
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
data Nat { .zero, .succ(Nat) }
fn even(n: Nat): Bool / {} { match n { .zero => Bool.true, .succ(let n) => odd(n) } }
fn odd(n: Nat): Bool / {} { match n { .zero => Bool.false, .succ(let n) => even(n) } }
---
even : (Nat) -> Bool
odd : (Nat) -> Bool
